chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1388 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 23.04.2025 Khawaja Rouf Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner The petitioner, stated to be individual, has filed this petition seeking the following relief/s: In view of the aforesaid reasons and circumstances, it is prayed in the interest of justice, equity and good conscience that this Honourable Court may be pleased to allowed the instant Constitution Petition of the Petitioner, as prayed hereinbelow without wasting the precious time of this Honorable Court in the larger interest of Justice. 1. To direct the Respondents to provide the following information as per the Article 19-A of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan (Right To Information), and also furnish the break-up of the Expenses of [Hajj Package -2024] of Hajj Amount and an amount of Rs.1,200,000/- as collected/received in approximately 5 months in advance from each Pilgrim: - i. Cost of Return Air Ticket [with Airline name] Per Pilgrim ii. Cost of Foods during the Hajj Per Pilgrim iii. Cost of Hotel Accommodation [Makkah, Madina etc] Per Pilgrim iv. Cost of Transportation [with complete details] Per Pilgrim v. Cost of Medical Expenses by Saudi Government [if any) during Mina/Arafat/ Muzalfaah/Jammarat/Haram. vi. Investigation Report for Total Died/Expired Pakistani Pilgrim vii. Total No. of Pakistani Pilgrims are in Hospitalized [ICU/Hospital] viii. Total No. of Pakistani Pilgrims have been Died in this Year-2024 ix.

Total No. of Pakistani Pilgrims are in Hospitalized [ICU/Hospital] viii. Total No. of Pakistani Pilgrims have been Died in this Year-2024 ix. Compensation Amount be Paid to each legal heirs of Died/Expired Pakistani Pilgrim x. Evidence of QURBANI (sacrifice) Vajib has to be provided to my client and details queries arises regarding Qurbani in his article Road to Mecca (Attached) xi. As today NO evidence is provided by Hajj ministry and Saudian Government my client 40 days Hajj exercise has been fruitless and amount paid against Hajj 2024 has to be paid back xii. Expense occurred in Mecca and after Hajj in Pakistan to stabiles his condition from Trauma and health issues related the incident at Jammat (Attached article road to Mecca) xiii. Furthermore Hajj ministry will inform my client what precautionary measurement will be taken in 2025 Hajj policy xiv. Furthermore Hajj ministry will insure to all pilgrims for Hajj 2025 Haj policy how the evidence of Qurbani will be ménage for each pilgrims of Hajj 2024 and details will also be provide to each pilgrims asking by my client in his (attached road to Mecca Hajj 2024) xv. Compensation Policy and Demurrage to be paid by Hajj Ministry for Hajj 2025 and procedure for claim must be informed to all Pilgrims before Hajj 2025 2. Any other relief(s), which this Honorable Court may deem fit and proper under the current available circumstances in the said Constitution Petition. Upon being confronted as to locus standi he remained unable to assist. Upon being queried as to why recourse had not been sought in the first instance before the concerned forum, including information commission, he remained unable to assist. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
